title: panicum dioicum
intro: Panicum dioicum, also known as Wild Millet or Bristle-leaf Panic Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. Wild Millet can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, where the dried leaves and roots are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
